p2p_enrichment.notes: Docker image builds successfully. No npm ci available (network-free), so tests use file structure and Node.js validation only. Original 5 p2p repo_tests: (1) test_all_modified_files_exist, (2) test_typescript_syntax_valid, (3) test_mcp_module_structure, (4) test_documentation_files_valid, (5) test_test_files_valid. ADDED 2 new p2p repo_tests: (6) test_mcp_deps_structure - validates all 7 MCP DEPS.list files exist, have valid sections, and strict mode is set for terminal files; (7) test_modified_files_deps_updated - verifies daemon.ts DEPS.list includes browserServerBackend.ts entry (PR-specific change). Total 7 pass_to_pass repo_tests from CI/CD analysis.
